test_strategy_summary: The wallet entry flow is well-covered by Flutter tests, but real-device wallet validation remains a required manual gate.

coverage_plan.risk: Persisted session restore could regress and break authenticated app entry.

tests.purpose: Verify persistence and restoration behavior stays stable.
Verify wallet gate and authenticated entry flow still render correctly.

coverage_plan.risk: A platform/device issue could pass local tests but fail on actual Android wallet connection.

tests.target: Android device + Mock MWA Wallet validation
tests.purpose: Verify authorize/sign flow on the real platform boundary.

missing_coverage: No automated device-level wallet-connect coverage exists yet
flaky_risks: Platform wallet integration remains partly manual and could hide environment-specific regressions
